notes.tohit: Bonus to hit in percentage points (10=+10%, 20=+20%, 30=+30%)
notes.death_gaze: Death gaze strength (resistance penalty target must save against)
notes.shared_units: Units 800-806 and 899-902 are shared across multiple races
notes.zombie_werewolf_variants: Units 1044-1046 and 1047-1049 are weapon-enchanted variants of Zombies/Werewolves
